name: listing_id
description: Unique listing identifier linking to raw listings table

name: sold_price
description: Target variable - final sale price in Swedish Kronor (SEK)

name: sold_date
description: Date when the property was sold, used for temporal validation and feature engineering

name: feature_date
description: Date when the engineered features were computed and materialized

name: listing_price
description: Original asking price when the property was first listed

name: living_area
description: Total living area of the property in square meters

name: rooms
description: Total number of rooms in the property

name: monthly_fee
description: Monthly housing association fee (avgift) in Swedish Kronor

name: days_on_market
description: Number of days the property was listed before being sold

name: construction_year
description: Year when the property was originally constructed

name: property_age
description: Age of the property in years (current year - construction_year)

name: price_per_sqm
description: Price per square meter calculated as listing_price / living_area

name: monthly_fee_per_sqm
description: Monthly fee per square meter calculated as monthly_fee / living_area

name: living_area_squared
description: Polynomial feature: living_area squared to capture non-linear size effects

name: area_sold_price_median_1m
description: Median sold price in the same area over the past 1 month

name: area_sold_price_median_3m
description: Median sold price in the same area over the past 3 months

name: area_sold_price_median_6m
description: Median sold price in the same area over the past 6 months

name: area_sold_price_median_12m
description: Median sold price in the same area over the past 12 months

name: area_sales_volume_1m
description: Number of properties sold in the same area over the past 1 month

name: area_sales_volume_3m
description: Number of properties sold in the same area over the past 3 months

name: area_sales_volume_6m
description: Number of properties sold in the same area over the past 6 months

name: area_sales_volume_12m
description: Number of properties sold in the same area over the past 12 months

name: days_since_scraped
description: Number of days since the listing was scraped from Booli.se

name: days_since_listed
description: Number of days since the property was first listed for sale

name: listed_month
description: Month when the property was listed (1-12)

name: listed_quarter
description: Quarter when the property was listed (1-4)

name: listed_weekday
description: Day of the week when the property was listed (0=Monday, 6=Sunday)

name: is_weekend_listing
description: Binary indicator: 1 if listed on weekend (Saturday/Sunday), 0 otherwise

name: listed_month_sin
description: Cyclical encoding of listing month using sine transformation

name: listed_month_cos
description: Cyclical encoding of listing month using cosine transformation

name: listed_quarter_sin
description: Cyclical encoding of listing quarter using sine transformation

name: listed_quarter_cos
description: Cyclical encoding of listing quarter using cosine transformation

name: is_tax_month
description: Binary indicator: 1 if listed during Swedish tax months (March/April), 0 otherwise

name: is_summer_peak
description: Binary indicator: 1 if listed during Swedish summer peak season (May-August), 0 otherwise

name: is_holiday_period
description: Binary indicator: 1 if listed during holiday periods (December/January/July), 0 otherwise

name: market_timing_score
description: Composite score combining multiple temporal factors affecting market timing

name: rooms_per_sqm
description: Room density calculated as rooms / living_area

name: fee_efficiency
description: Fee efficiency calculated as monthly_fee / living_area

name: total_cost_per_sqm
description: Total ownership cost per square meter including listing price and annual fees

name: distance_to_center
description: Estimated distance from property to Stockholm city center (0-5 scale)

name: distance_to_city_center
description: True distance to Stockholm city center in meters (Sergels Torg, via Haversine formula)

name: distance_to_nearest_metro
description: Distance to nearest metro station in meters

name: distance_to_nearest_train
description: Distance to nearest train station in meters

name: metro_stations_within_500m
description: Number of metro stations within 500 meters

name: metro_stations_within_1km
description: Number of metro stations within 1 kilometer

name: transit_accessibility_score
description: Composite transit access score from metro, train, and center proximity

name: area_inventory
description: Number of properties available for sale in the same area

name: area_price_volatility
description: Standard deviation of listing prices in the same area

name: area_price_median
description: Median listing price in the same area

name: area_days_on_market_median
description: Median days on market for properties in the same area

name: area_price_change_mean
description: Average price change (sold_price - listing_price) in the same area

name: area_price_change_count
description: Number of properties with price changes in the same area

name: area_liquidity
description: Market liquidity calculated as area_inventory / area_days_on_market_median

name: relative_area_price
description: Relative price compared to area median (listing_price / area_price_median)

name: area_volatility_score
description: Price volatility normalized by area median (area_price_volatility / area_price_median)

name: micro_area_ppsqm_median
description: Prior local median sold price per square meter from the selected H3/area fallback

name: micro_area_ppsqm_p75
description: Prior local 75th percentile sold price per square meter from the selected H3/area fallback

name: micro_area_ppsqm_p90
description: Prior local 90th percentile sold price per square meter from the selected H3/area fallback

name: micro_area_ppsqm_count
description: Prior sample count behind the selected micro-area price per square meter median

name: micro_area_ppsqm_premium_vs_area
description: Selected micro-area median price per square meter relative to prior area median

name: micro_area_upper_tail_ratio
description: Selected micro-area p90 price per square meter divided by its median

name: h3_neighbor_ppsqm
description: Prior weighted neighboring H3 price per square meter from adjacent resolution 10 cells

name: h3_neighbor_ppsqm_p75
description: Prior weighted 75th percentile neighboring H3 price per square meter from adjacent resolution 10 cells

name: h3_neighbor_ppsqm_p90
description: Prior weighted 90th percentile neighboring H3 price per square meter from adjacent resolution 10 cells

name: h3_neighbor_ppsqm_count
description: Prior sample count behind neighboring H3 price per square meter

name: h3_neighbor_premium_vs_micro
description: Neighboring H3 price per square meter relative to selected micro-area price per square meter

name: h3_neighbor_upper_tail_ratio
description: Neighboring H3 p90 price per square meter divided by neighboring median price per square meter

name: same_size_ppsqm_median
description: Prior same-size price per square meter using H3, area, or global size-band fallback

name: same_size_ppsqm_p75
description: Prior same-size 75th percentile price per square meter using H3, area, or global size-band fallback

name: same_size_ppsqm_p90
description: Prior same-size 90th percentile price per square meter using H3, area, or global size-band fallback

name: same_size_ppsqm_count
description: Prior sample count behind same-size price per square meter

name: same_size_premium_vs_area
description: Same-size price per square meter relative to selected micro-area price per square meter

name: same_size_upper_tail_ratio
description: Same-size p90 price per square meter divided by same-size median price per square meter

name: street_area_ppsqm_median
description: Prior street-and-area median sold price per square meter, falling back to micro-area comps

name: street_area_ppsqm_p75
description: Prior street-and-area 75th percentile sold price per square meter

name: street_area_ppsqm_p90
description: Prior street-and-area 90th percentile sold price per square meter

name: street_area_ppsqm_count
description: Prior sample count behind street-and-area price per square meter features

name: street_area_premium_vs_micro
description: Street-and-area median price per square meter relative to selected micro-area median

name: street_area_upper_tail_ratio
description: Street-and-area p90 price per square meter divided by street-and-area median

name: street_size_ppsqm_median
description: Prior same-street same-size median sold price per square meter

name: street_size_ppsqm_p75
description: Prior same-street same-size 75th percentile sold price per square meter

name: street_size_ppsqm_p90
description: Prior same-street same-size 90th percentile sold price per square meter

name: street_size_ppsqm_count
description: Prior sample count behind same-street same-size price per square meter features

name: street_size_premium_vs_street
description: Same-street same-size median price per square meter relative to street median

name: street_size_upper_tail_ratio
description: Same-street same-size p90 price per square meter divided by same-street same-size median

name: address_ppsqm_median
description: Prior exact-address median sold price per square meter, falling back to street comps

name: address_ppsqm_p75
description: Prior exact-address 75th percentile sold price per square meter

name: address_ppsqm_p90
description: Prior exact-address 90th percentile sold price per square meter

name: address_ppsqm_count
description: Prior sample count behind exact-address price per square meter features

name: address_premium_vs_street
description: Exact-address median price per square meter relative to street median

name: address_upper_tail_ratio
description: Exact-address p90 price per square meter divided by exact-address median

name: h3_market_ppsqm_ratio
description: Selected H3 or fallback prior price per square meter divided by previous-month market PPSQM index

name: same_size_market_ppsqm_ratio
description: Prior same-size price per square meter divided by previous-month market PPSQM index

name: neighbor_market_ppsqm_ratio
description: Prior neighboring H3 price per square meter divided by previous-month market PPSQM index

name: micro_luxury_score
description: Inference-safe high-end proxy score from prior local PPSQM ratios, central area, and size

name: luxury_location_flag
description: Binary high-end location proxy derived from micro_luxury_score

name: market_interest_rate
description: Latest previous-month Swedish policy interest rate from local economy reference data

name: market_interest_rate_change_3m
description: Three-month change in Swedish policy interest rate

name: market_economic_tendency
description: Latest previous-month KI economic tendency indicator

name: market_consumer_confidence
description: Latest previous-month KI consumer confidence indicator

name: market_construction_confidence
description: Latest previous-month KI construction confidence indicator

name: market_gdp_growth
description: Latest available GDP growth percent from local quarterly reference data

name: market_ppsqm_index
description: Latest previous-month market price per square meter index

name: market_ppsqm_index_change_3m
description: Three-month change in market price per square meter index

name: market_sales_volume
description: Latest previous-month market sales volume from local reference data

name: market_months_since_2020
description: As-of month index counted from January 2020

name: market_data_age_months
description: Months between the as-of month and the latest matched market reference row

name: construction_quality_score
description: Estimated construction quality score based on architectural era (1-10 scale)

name: energy_efficiency_est
description: Estimated energy efficiency score based on construction year and size (1-10 scale)

name: floor
description: Floor number where the apartment is located

name: floor_height_premium
description: Non-linear floor premium using log transformation to capture diminishing returns

name: amenity_score
description: Composite score combining elevator, balcony, and floor amenities

name: area_age_interaction
description: Interaction feature: living_area * property_age

name: rooms_age_interaction
description: Interaction feature: rooms * property_age

name: fee_price_interaction
description: Normalized interaction: monthly_fee / (listing_price + 1)

name: luxury_score
description: Multi-factor luxury score combining price, size, and construction quality

name: value_score
description: Value score calculated as living_area / total_ownership_cost

name: floor_per_sqm
description: Floor density calculated as floor / living_area

name: area_location_score
description: Location premium score: distance_to_center * construction_quality_score

name: timing_location_interaction
description: Market timing and location interaction: market_timing_score * area_liquidity

name: efficiency_quality_score
description: Combined efficiency and quality score: energy_efficiency_est * construction_quality_score

name: size_era_interaction
description: Size and era interaction: living_area * construction_quality_score

name: rooms_efficiency_interaction
description: Room density and efficiency interaction: rooms_per_sqm * energy_efficiency_est

name: volatility_timing_interaction
description: Market volatility and timing interaction: area_volatility_score * market_timing_score

name: liquidity_season_interaction
description: Market liquidity and season interaction: area_liquidity * is_summer_peak

name: momentum_distance_interaction
description: Market momentum and distance interaction for hot markets

name: property_desirability_score
description: Comprehensive desirability score combining quality, location, efficiency, liquidity, and timing

name: enhancement_potential
description: Potential for property enhancement based on renovation likelihood, era, and location

name: price_acceleration_3m
description: Price acceleration over 3 months: (area_sold_price_median_1m - area_sold_price_median_3m) / area_sold_price_median_3m

name: cost_benefit_ratio
description: Cost-benefit ratio: (living_area * energy_efficiency_est) / total_ownership_cost

name: temporal_price_trend
description: Temporal price trend across different time windows

name: efficiency_premium
description: Price premium based on energy efficiency and construction quality

name: demand_supply_ratio
description: Demand-supply ratio: area_sales_volume_3m / area_inventory

name: area_avg_price
description: Average listing price in the same area

name: area_listing_count
description: Total number of listings in the same area

name: area_target_encoded
description: Leave-one-out target encoding of area using sold prices

name: description_length
description: Normalized listing description character length

name: description_word_count
description: Normalized listing description word count

name: is_renovated
description: Flag from description text indicating renovation cues

name: has_modern_kitchen
description: Flag from description text indicating a modern or renovated kitchen

name: has_modern_bathroom
description: Flag from description text indicating a modern or renovated bathroom

name: has_view
description: Flag from description text indicating view cues

name: is_quiet_location
description: Flag from description text indicating a quiet location

name: needs_renovation
description: Flag from description text indicating renovation need

name: luxury_keyword_count
description: Count of premium description cues

name: condition_score
description: Composite condition score from description cues

name: premium_score
description: Composite premium score from description cues

name: area
description: Standardized neighborhood/area name

name: age_bucket
description: Property age category: new (≤10 years), modern (11-30 years), old (>30 years)

name: space_efficiency
description: Space efficiency category based on rooms_per_sqm: luxury_spacious, spacious, efficient, cramped

name: area_price_tier
description: Area price tier classification: budget, mid, premium, luxury

name: h3_res10
description: H3 cell at resolution 10 derived from listing coordinates

name: h3_res9
description: Parent H3 cell at resolution 9 used as sparse-cell fallback

name: micro_area_resolution_used
description: Source level used for micro-area stats: h3_res10, h3_res9, area, or global

name: same_size_scope_used
description: Source level used for same-size comp stats: h3_res9_size, area_size, global_size, or global

name: street_name
description: Normalized street name extracted from listing address

name: street_area_scope_used
description: Source level used for street-area comp stats: street_area or micro_area

name: street_size_scope_used
description: Source level used for same-street same-size comp stats: street_size or street_area

name: address_comp_scope_used
description: Source level used for exact-address comp stats: address or street_area

name: luxury_location_tier
description: High-end proxy tier derived from prior comp PPSQM ratios: standard, strong, premium, luxury

name: market_cycle
description: Market cycle phase based on listing year: boom, stable, downturn, recovery

name: swedish_season
description: Swedish real estate season: winter_low, spring_start, summer_peak, autumn_active

name: school_period
description: School calendar period: school_start, school_active, school_end, holiday

name: dom_momentum
description: Days on market momentum: hot_market (≤7 days), normal (8-30 days), slow (>30 days)

name: area_price_momentum
description: Area price momentum: stable, rising, falling, bidding_war

name: architectural_era
description: Architectural era classification: pre_war, functionalism, modern, contemporary

name: renovation_likelihood
description: Renovation likelihood based on property age: high, medium, low

name: has_elevator
description: Elevator availability: yes, no

name: has_balcony
description: Balcony availability: yes, no

name: floor_tier
description: Floor tier classification: ground, low (1-2), mid (3-5), high (6+), unknown
